bead.title: observability: record resolved route + quota + filter reasons in routing/attempt metrics (D7)
bead.description:
PROBLEM
DDx's durable routing/attempt metrics omit the facts that make routing auditable and that justify "more reliable + tracked than a bare TUI": the resolved provider/model, the route reason, quota state, and candidate filter reasons are not recorded. See cli/internal/agent/routing_metrics.go and cli/internal/attemptmetrics/attemptmetrics.go (re-pin line refs against HEAD). Now that D1 (ddx-6190edc6, merged) captures the fizeau-resolved route mid-stream via OnRouteResolved, these facts are available to record.

PROPOSED FIX
Record, in the routing outcome event + attempt metrics + bead routing evidence + work log: resolved harness, resolved provider, resolved model, route reason, quota trend/state (if surfaced), and the candidate filter/exclusion reasons (if surfaced by fizeau's RoutingDecision). Source the resolved route from the OnRouteResolved callback / the drain's RoutingDecision (agent_runner_service.go), not from the requested pins.

NON-SCOPE: no new fizeau fields — use what ServiceRoutingDecisionData already carries (Harness/Provider/Model/Reason and any exclusion fields present).

ACCEPTANCE
1. New test: an attempt whose RoutingDecision resolves harness=claude/provider=anthropic/model=sonnet-4.6 records those exact values (not empty/requested) in routing_metrics and attemptmetrics.
2. The routing event/evidence includes a non-empty route_reason for a routed attempt.
3. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/attemptmetrics/... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
